title: WeRead
description: Web application for reading management where users can log books, rate them and share their personal library. Includes authentication, dynamic data handling and frontend-backend communication for data persistence.

title: Centro Viena Web
description: Digital product catalog for the hardware and general store industry. Allows users to browse items quickly with a fully responsive layout, without traditional e-commerce. Commercial interaction is handled through direct WhatsApp integration. Data is managed statically via JSON, prioritizing simplicity and performance.
